acceptance_criteria: MusicXML/XML/MXL import remains local and normalizes to a renderer-independent score model
The score game uses the Web Audio clock and handles key changes, pickup, ties, and simple repeats
Direct and condensed choir parts expose confidence and manual mapping before grading
PDF recognition stays local, loads only after explicit selection, and requires correction confirmation
PDF recognition creates no server upload or persisted microphone/score payload
Score and OMR assets are absent from initial TUNING and PRACTICE graphs
Physical iPhone, Android, and desktop score-game checks are recorded before cutover

evidence.source: MusicXML 4.0, OpenSheetMusicDisplay, Audiveris, MDN Web Audio
evidence.result: canonical structured-score pipeline and correction-gated OMR selected
local score import, choir mapping, correction gate, and audio-clock voice run implemented
MusicXML and printed PDF preview flows pass desktop Chromium browser checks
